entries.name: Pixel
entries.description: Image artist agent. Crafts prompts, iterates on outputs, owns visual quality.
useCases: Generate on-brand social and marketing images
Iterate on visual concepts until they land
Own image quality across your asset library

entries.name: Rolo
entries.description: Video producer agent. Generates video + audio, mixes finished assets.
useCases: Produce short-form video from a brief
Generate and mix audio tracks
Assemble finished cuts into your asset library

entries.name: Jessica
entries.description: Research agent — multi-source discovery, evidence gathering, synthesis support.
useCases: Deep-dive a market, competitor, or topic
Gather and cross-check evidence from many sources
Turn raw findings into a synthesized brief

entries.name: Patch
entries.description: Developer agent — API integrations, automation, debugging, tool extensions.
useCases: Wire up API integrations and webhooks
Automate repetitive technical chores
Debug failures and extend agent tooling

entries.name: H'enrich
entries.description: Vision utility agent — captions, OCR, and tags for asset search. Powers zero-config enrichment; not dispatchable, no channels.
useCases: Auto-caption and tag every image you save
OCR screenshots so their text is searchable
Keep asset search rich without lifting a finger

entries.name: Messaging
entries.description: Content planning, calendar items, brainstorming sessions, approvals, and channel delivery.
useCases: Plan a week of posts on a content calendar
Route drafts through an approval gate
Deliver approved content to channels

entries.name: Projects
entries.description: Project specs, checklists, task links, assets, and project-context agent tools.
useCases: Keep specs, checklists, and tasks in one place
Link agent work back to the project it serves
Give agents project context automatically
